content_body:
Did you know that Georgia has mountains? In the northern tier of Georgia, the Appalachian Mountains begin traversing their way up to Maine. And where there are mountains, there are cabins!

Cabin Rentals in Georgia

Plan a cabin trip to Georgia and discover our luxury cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, Georgia. Our luxury Blue Ridge GA cabins stand out from the rest in that Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers the very best cabins in Georgia, along with superior customer service. Here’s what a few of our recent guests have experienced:

"An absolutely first-class experience from beginning to end. The cabin was perfect, and the attention given to my wife and me while we were there was excellent and never intrusive. We were also given local tips and places to see and experience during our stay…truly above and beyond."

Family Owned, Oriented, and Operated Cabin Rentals in GA

What started as a family adventure to Blue Ridge, GA, turned into a family business over the course of 20 years. We were just starting our family back then and now today, both kids, Taylor and Travis, are integral parts of our company. Knowing all the ins and outs since they could walk and talk, they both give fresh insight and perspective to the vacation rental industry with their many talents ~ from providing concierge services and area recommendations to providing musical entertainment for our corporate retreat events and so much more. Our family dynamic truly sets Cabin Rentals of Georgia above the rest. From several of our guests:

"Our weekend in the cabin Serendipity was indeed just that! The house was spectacular! The views were amazing, the beds were comfy, and the property grounds were breathtaking. The owners were also extremely kind people. Their children, Travis and Taylor, organized most of our activities with genuine enthusiasm for helping us create memories. Being a parent myself, I can't help but share how outstanding these kids are. I really can't put into words how special this experience was. From the excitement of jet skis on the lake to the tranquility of sitting on the deck watching the sunset, the whole experience was amazing. As we were leaving, my brother's 7-year-old son said, "if this was the best weekend of your life, raise your hand". That really sums it up! We will certainly be back!"

"What a wonderful weekend! This is our second time renting from Cabin Rentals of Georgia, and both times were perfect. We stayed at the Serendipity on Noontootla Creek cabin with extended family. The house was extremely comfortable, well-appointed, and super clean. We enjoyed the beautiful views and the scenery. But the best thing about this place was Taylor, Travis, and Gary, who helped us organize our activities and made sure that our visit was unforgettable. We will definitely be back. Thanks for everything!"

 

Blue Ridge, Georgia

Blue Ridge, GA is one of the most popular mountain towns in the Southeast. The small-town charm and warmth combined with all the outdoor mountain activities make Blue Ridge the magical place that it is. Not only do the Blue Ridge Mountains provide opportunities for hiking, waterfall hikes, zip lining, fly-fishing, canoeing/kayaking, and geocaching, but our quaint Downtown Blue Ridge Main Street offers exceptional foodie restaurants, boutiques, art galleries, antiques, as well as fun things for the kids to do. There is truly something for everyone to experience, both young and old.

 

Fun Things to Do With Kids in Blue Ridge, GA

The North GA Mountains provide an awesome natural playground for kids of any age, from young to teens. Fall Branch Falls is an easy waterfall hike for young tots close to Downtown Blue Ridge. Gem mining is popular with families at the Lilly Pad Village or Aska Mining Company. Horseback riding is always fun. Hiking the mountain trails looking for geocaches is like a treasure hunt in the mountains - be sure to bring a small trinket to replace with something you take from the geocache! The Swinging Bridge is a must-see and is a perfect place to picnic and play in the Toccoa River for the day. In the warmer months, tubing the Toccoa, boating, and swimming in the crystal clear turquoise waters of Lake Blue Ridge are always a good idea. For the day, hang out at the beach on Lake Blue Ridge at Morganton Point.

The kid's shops in Downtown Blue Ridge could easily entertain your crew for an entire day - from a vast selection of pinball machines at Vertigo, old-fashioned (and new-fashioned) candies, games, books, T-shirts, and souvenirs at Huck’s General Store to a mountain of comic books at Mountain Man Comics and a nice selection of vinyls at Deaf Man Vinyls. For the little ones, there is a fantastic park in the town’s center with benches for parents to watch their kiddos blow off steam.

Couples Retreats, Girls Getaway Weekend, Guys Trip

Couples Retreats

Couple retreats are popular in Blue Ridge, especially in our large Blue Ridge cabins. Offering several five bedroom/5 bath luxury cabin lodging, these homes are perfect for each couple to have their own bedroom/bath and space. Situated along the Toccoa River or Noontootla Creek, either locale offers the peaceful serenity you may be looking for.

"The Fallen Timber Lodge was a fantastic house to spend time with friends. It provided a large living area outside and inside to enjoy visiting with each other. The views are outstanding and can be accessed both inside the home and along the large outside porch area. We had 8 persons sharing the space and it was quite spacious. The amenities in the home were great; we were able to cook/grill dinner with ease. The surrounding area was quiet and the river access was an added bonus. We were also able to enjoy the hot tub and pool table to pass the time together. So many choices to eat and visit in Blue Ridge, which are within a 15-minute drive from the home."

Girls Getaway Weekend

Weekend getaways with the girls or the guys are always a blast with Cabin Rentals of Georgia as we provide itineraries for activities to make the most of your time in Blue Ridge, GA. Not only does everyone stay in a luxurious cabin rental, but we also provide special itineraries to help you make the most of your time in Blue Ridge. Here’s what past getaway guests have said:

"Awesome girls' trip weekend! The cabin was the perfect layout for our group. Loved the curved sofa for socializing in the evenings. Beautiful views and a convenient location for all of our adventures. The beds were very comfortable and the sheets were soft. Views were very nice from all rooms, not just the main living room. All in all, Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is a beautiful home!"

Romantic Cabin Rentals for Proposals, Honeymoons, and Anniversaries


Riverview Lodge

Many a romantic weekend has been spent in our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals. From cabin rentals situated against a backdrop of beautiful mountains or Lake Blue Ridge, we have been blessed to hear of happy marriage proposals, honeymoons, and anniversaries spent in our luxury cabin rentals. What could be more romantic than spending time with the one you love in a beautiful log cabin with ambient lighting, plush beds, hot tubs under the stars, beautiful fireplaces and all the cozy comforts you dream of in a romantic cabin rental.

"When Charles whisked me off after our wedding to head to our secret surprise honeymoon that he had planned, I knew a week with him anywhere would be wonderful...little did I know how awesome of a week it would be. What a surprise! I think my jaw hit the ground when we pulled up to BEAUTIFUL Riverview Lodge. The first week together could not have been more perfect - the house is wonderful. The view of the river and mountains is breathtaking. We so enjoyed the walk down to the River, the Gazebo, the Train which we waved to and rode one day, hikes to nearby waterfalls, but most of all the relaxing peace and quiet, time together after waiting so patiently for it, are memories to be treasured forever. This truly was the perfect place to begin our new life together. Thank you for sharing your home with us." MI

"I said YES at Cohutta Sunset! Thank you for providing the most romantic cabin for us. The memories we created here will never be forgotten. We look forward to spending our anniversaries here! Thanks again!"

Family Reunions in Blue Ridge

Family reunions are very popular with Cabin Rentals of Georgia as we offer several unique large cabins in one area along the Toccoa River that are just waiting for family fun! Providing access to almost a 1,000 feet of Toccoa River frontage, our guests can enjoy fishing from the property, putting in a tube or kayak to float into McCaysville/Horseshoe Bend Park, or just tie up a tube to a tree and enjoy the cool mountain fresh water as you soak up the sun. Many happy memories have been created during awesome family reunions and below are some happy testimonials:

"Family gatherings are very special to us since we are only able to do it twice a year. From AL, South Georgia and even all the way from Oregon, so this week in the mountains at Fallen Timber Lodge was very special. We have decided against the beach from now on - it's mountains, blue skies and water! Monday was the perfect lazy, rainy day. Tuesday was a day of fishing and exploring - the gazebo alone has inspired a backyard getaway reminder. Wednesday, July 4th, was a great day of BBQ, laughter and good food. Thursday was "venture day" from precious boutiques downtown, a record breaking round of golf at Butternut Creek - nice course in Blairsville, a three-year old's first catch with Daddy, and Baby's first wave at the train - it was a blessed day. On Friday we put the "ad" in Adventure when seven of us went whitewater rafting and only three stayed in the boat for the entire trip!! "scars are tattoos with better stories"! That night we REALLY appreciated the hot tub. All in all the week was FULL of great food, memorable moments and family togetherness. Thanks so much, The Payton Family"

 

Blue Ridge Corporate Retreats


Fallen Timber Lodge

Corporate Retreats are also very popular with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Our unique large cabins for large groups provide private ensuite baths in every bedroom, giving every team member the privacy they need. Whether located along the Toccoa River or in the Aska Adventure Area, our large cabin rentals are ideally situated in areas close to team-building activities or activities designed to overcome personal limitations. In addition, we can provide pontoon boat rentals, live music, and acreage for large campfire experience to enhance your corporate retreat agenda.

"I cannot recommend this company and these cabins enough. We rented four cabins for a 3 day work retreat and everything was PERFECT. The views, the space, the decor -- all of it. When I arrived to what we'd determined would be our 'main cabin' for the weekend, Gary (owner) was one step ahead, getting a fire started for us inside. Throughout our stay, he checked on us regularly, ensuring we were happy campers. The cabins themselves are magnificent, but the service is not to be understated either. Such a wonderful experience all the way around. I miss it already!"

"At our Public Safety Trainer Retreat we experienced many "AHA" moments at this amazing getaway. Many discussions took place while viewing the spectacular sunsets from the porch. We visited Fall Branch Falls and the waterfalls were incredibly beautiful. Visiting the Swinging Bridge was awesome - spectacular view and easy hike. We love your home and the warmth it provided us on this memorable trip. Thank you so much! ~ Florida and New York"

"Our agency rented Serendipity on Noontootla Creek for a corporate retreat. The pictures do not do justice to how incredibly beautiful this home is! As soon as you walk in the door, you are in awe of the quality and beauty of the home. We were greeted with music playing and the air turned on so that we would be comfortable as soon as we stepped into the home! The kitchen is state of the art with everything you will need to cook any type of dinner. The bedrooms were very welcoming with samples of soap and other goodies placed on the bed with extra fluffy towels. All three floors offered opportunities for relaxing! There is a sun porch that called us to take time to relax and enjoy the view! The outdoor fireplace was a great gathering place at night to reflect on our thoughts for the day and to gaze at the stars. I highly recommend this house! The price is excellent for such a quality home. We are very thankful to have had such a beautiful, restful setting for our retreat and plan on returning next year!"

 

Cabin Rentals of Georgia provides the best cabins in Georgia for your mountain getaway ~ couples retreat, girls getaway weekend, guys trip, family reunion, corporate retreat, honeymoon, anniversary, proposal, or just to get away ~ We will be there every step of the way to make sure your cabin trip in Blue Ridge, GA will be memorable. Browse our boutique luxury collection of cabin rentals and start making memories!
title: Best Cabins in Georgia
